scenarios.title: Monthly recommendation is written to Google Calendar
scenarios.given: card_rewards.enabled and calendar_sync are true with a valid credential + calendar id
scenarios.when: the card-rewards calendar sync runs for a period
scenarios.then: each recommendation with a recommended card is written as a stable-UID Google Calendar event, and a re-run updates the same event without duplicating it

scenarios.title: Calendar sync disabled keeps recommendations in the Web UI only
scenarios.then: no calendar client is constructed, no event is written, and the recommendations remain queryable for the Web UI

scenarios.title: Enabled-but-misconfigured fails loud
scenarios.given: card_rewards.enabled and calendar_sync are true but CARD_REWARDS_GCAL_CREDENTIALS or CARD_REWARDS_CALENDAR_ID is empty
scenarios.then: config load fails naming the offending key
